name: editor4c: Delete removes the character to the right of the caret
_note: Phase B pilot — 4B's backspace-delete.json exercises Backspace (deleteContentBackward). This covers deleteContentForward, the sibling case with distinct browser event handling and separate reducer branches. Uses Cmd+A + type to normalise the h1 to exactly 'ABC', then Home + Delete → 'BC' (equals, not just contains).
